title: Immunization catch-up review

investigations.text: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.
investigations.rationale: Supports pre-dose contraindication and precaution screening for child immunization catch-up review; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

follow_up.text: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.
follow_up.rationale: Supports national childhood programme and schedule context for child immunization catch-up review; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization

exact_section.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5. Childhood Immunization Program 0 to 6 Years

follow_up.text: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.
follow_up.rationale: Supports vaccination-history review and age-appropriate catch-up without restarting solely for elapsed time for child immunization catch-up review; no decision is generated.
follow_up.evidence_extract: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, records and evidence, vaccines and doses, dates, interval calculations, contraindications, special risks, catch-up schedule and clinician plan are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for child immunization catch-up review.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
